conversations.content: Let's do a special rule knowledge quiz to test your understanding of special rules.

Answer using the special rule explained earlier. The pressure of the electrolyte storage tank in the Aurora New Energy battery plant exceeds the safety threshold. According to the high-risk operation hazard prevention code, what should be done?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>How to handle electrolyte storage tank pressure exceeding the safety threshold</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:70003] Time: 2026-06-08-17:10, Content: Aurora New Energy Battery Plant High-Risk Operation Hazard Prevention Code: If the electrolyte storage tank pressure exceeds the safety threshold, automatically open the pressure relief exhaust valve; if the humidity in the cleanroom drops below the insulation lower limit, activate the high-voltage static elimination device; if sparks appear on the electrode sheet rolling roller, immediately spray FK-5-1-12 fire extinguishing agent; if thermal runaway occurs in the formation process cell, push the faulty module into an explosion-proof water tank for isolation. Low-relevance memory fragments: none.

conversations.think: Memory [mem-id:70003] stipulates that if the electrolyte storage tank pressure exceeds the threshold, automatically open the pressure relief exhaust valve.
conversations.content: According to the hazard prevention code, you must automatically open the pressure relief exhaust valve!
Correct! You have mastered this rule.
